title: carex stenophylla var. longipedicellata
intro: Carex stenophylla var. longipedicellata, also known as long-stalked sedge, is a variant of the Carex stenophylla plant species, which is a type of sedge that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and fever. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, aiding in digestion, and acting as an expectorant to relieve respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, Carex stenophylla var. longipedicellata is often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
